message: Phase 2 complete\! System Hub created, 16+ files extracted, 20 named agents registered, CLAUDE.md reduced 90%. Full details in Claude Flow memory (namespace=bubba, key=phase2-completion). Ready for 'set and forget' operations.
Swarm deployed: 3 agents working on Dynamic Agent Workforce System (7 phases). Agent 1: Memory+Heartbeat, Agent 2: Check-in+Disconnection+Reconnection, Agent 3: Commands+Dashboard
